spec.description: Revenue + AI ROI panels for the NeonCart app. Built 2026-05-23 via MCP.

spec.title: Per-agent ROI (1h)
spec.description: Per-agent ROI: attributed_revenue / token_cost across the last hour. Anything > 1 means the agent earns more than its token cost. Joined on gen_ai_agent_name.

spec.title: AI agent ROI (combined, 1h)
spec.description: Combined AI agent ROI — attributed revenue / token cost over the last hour, across ALL nc-* agents. > 1.0 = AI pays for itself. < 1.0 = bleeding.

spec.title: Add-to-Cart per source
spec.description: ATC events sliced by source. `manual` = direct shopper click. `ai_chatbot` = nc-chatbot suggested it. `ai_gift_finder` = gift-finder agent suggested it.

spec.title: Eval verdicts (24h)
spec.description: Total NeonCart evaluator executions (sum across all evaluators, 24h).

spec.title: Quality pass rate (ncQuality, 1h)
spec.description: % of sampled chatbot/gift-finder turns the LLM judge scored as high quality.

spec.title: Groundedness pass rate (1h)
spec.description: Are AI responses tied to real catalog/cart data?

spec.title: Hallucination rate (24h)
spec.description: Share of sampled turns flagged as likely hallucination. Lower is better.

spec.title: Sentiment positivity (24h)
spec.description: % of customer-facing turns the sentiment judge scored positive/neutral.

spec.title: Pass rate per evaluator (1h smoothed)
spec.description: Pass-rate trend per NeonCart evaluator over time.

spec.title: Pass rate per agent — ncQuality (1h)
spec.description: Quality pass-rate split by nc-chatbot vs nc-gift-finder.

spec.title: Verdict mix (1h stacked)
spec.description: Stacked verdicts per hour — green pass, rose fail, orange error.

spec.title: Hallucination + groundedness fails (24h)
spec.description: Worst offenders by agent. Empty if everyone's behaving.

spec.title: Add-to-Cart per model
spec.description: ATC events sliced by gen_ai_request_model. Populates as the model label rolls out across new loadgen traffic (parallel commit landing 2026-05-23). Empty before that.

spec.title: AI conversion lift (AI ATC / manual ATC, 1h)
spec.description: Ratio: AI-attributed ATC rate vs manual ATC rate. >1 = AI is suggesting more cart-adds than humans are clicking on their own. 1h window.

spec.title: Revenue rate ($/hour)
spec.description: Realized revenue from completed checkouts, projected to $/hour.

spec.title: Projected weekly revenue
spec.description: Current 1h revenue rate projected forward by 7 days (rate × 86400 × 7). Linear extrapolation — assumes constant traffic.

spec.title: AI-attributed revenue (last 24h)
spec.description: Cumulative revenue attributed to AI agents (gift-finder + chatbot) in the trailing 24h.

spec.title: 🎯 AI quality at a glance — eval results
AI o11y — NeonCart Business Impact
